name: roblox-asset-previewer
description: The Roblox Asset Previewer for VS Code takes the mystery out of asset IDs. Get instant visual previews, author details, and asset types displayed inline with your scripts. Develop faster, debug smarter.

commands.title: Roblox Asset Preview: Listen to Audio

RobloxAssetPreviewer.apiKey.description: Roblox Open Cloud API Key (requires 'legacy-asset:manage' or 'asset:read' scope) for private assets.

RobloxAssetPreviewer.oauthToken.description: Roblox Open Cloud OAuth 2.0 Bearer Token for private assets.
